title: Stir-Fried Malaysian Lamb
description: A flavorful and aromatic Malaysian-inspired stir-fry dish made with lamb, vegetables, and caramelized onions.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the wok and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil to the wok.
Add the sliced ginger and minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the caramelized onion and stir-fry for another minute.
Return the lamb to the wok and stir-fry until the meat is cooked through.
Add chili flakes, if using, and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot garnished with fresh cilantro, if desired.
